title: Hexasis Client
description: The client for the best vanilla-ish survival experience.
body:
![Hexasis Client banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0861f954a8f1a47d93dadfe74b8162a6ce7dc05a_0.webp)

**The** client for the best vanilla-ish survival experience. Originally made for [_Helix Survival_](https://play.hexasis.eu/).

For the best experience, you should play on a server with the following mods installed:
- [Advanced Shulkerboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-shulkerboxes)
- [Armor Stands](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-stands)
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)
- [Do a Barrel Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll)
- [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/plugin/emotecraft)
- [Inventory Management](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-management)
- [ItemSwapper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemswapper)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)

_an official server pack is coming soon™_
